title: Devyani International is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Devyani International is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
Devyani International is actively seeking a talented and motivated Guest Relations Manager to join our dynamic team in Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Devyani International:
Devyani International is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Devyani International!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
